identity.name: Chiranjeet Banerjee
identity.title: Experience Design Lead / Manager
identity.summary: Experience Design Lead with 13+ years across UX, information architecture, research, and product design. Also creates editorial-style photography and AI-assisted visual art (synthography) under the name Broekn Camera.

blisseCode.name: Blisse Code
blisseCode.focus: UX strategy, AI integration consulting, design audits, and productized research services

broeknCamera.name: Broekn Camera
broeknCamera.focus: Premium cinematic portraiture and AI-assisted visual art with a neo-noir, emotionally raw aesthetic

approach: Evidence-first, then action: weighs options, notes risks, and decides deliberately
Mental models and IA before UI: models user thinking, structures content flows, then designs screens
Clear prioritization frameworks: RICE, Kano, MoSCoW, Opportunity Scoring
Revenue-aware design thinking: every design decision ties back to a measurable business question
Skeptical, evidence-led thinking: does not chase trends, focuses on what converts and retains

offerLadder.entry: Productized UX audit or mini strategy consult
offerLadder.mid: Workshops, consulting sprints, brand content packages
offerLadder.high: Premium commissioned shoots, retainers, enterprise consulting

values: Accuracy and skeptical thinking over motivational fluff
Premium and selective over mass volume
antiClaims: Does not overclaim results without evidence
Does not use fake testimonials or inflated credentials
Does not promise specific conversion lifts without data
Does not take on projects misaligned with quality standards
Does not do mass content farming or low-value work

faq.q: What kind of projects does Chiranjeet take on?
faq.a: Select consulting, audit, and creative projects. Focused on UX strategy, AI workflow integration, and premium visual work. Not available for low-budget or mass-market content work.

faq.q: Is Chiranjeet available for freelance work?
faq.a: Chiranjeet takes on select projects alongside full-time work. Best to book a 30-minute call to discuss scope and fit.

faq.q: What makes Chiranjeet different from other designers?
faq.a: The rare combination of UX leadership, AI workflow expertise, and cinematic visual storytelling. Evidence-led, revenue-aware thinking rather than trend-chasing.

faq.q: Does Chiranjeet work with international clients?
faq.a: Yes. Based in Kuala Lumpur but available for remote work across Southeast Asia and internationally.

faq.q: What tools and methods does Chiranjeet use?
faq.a: Figma for design, various research and synthesis methods including affinity mapping, card sorting, and usability testing. Uses RICE, Kano, and MoSCoW for prioritization. Design systems thinking with tokens and components.
